success.update: The billing cycle settings were successfully updated.

billCycle.label: How often should invoices be issued?

billDay.label: Which day should invoices be issued?

currentCycleEndDate.label: Which date should the current billing cycle end on?

warnings.autoConsolidationEnabled:
Auto-consolidation is enabled for this engagement.
Changing the Billing Cycle Settings will disable auto-consolidation and may cause billing issues.
Please consult with the Finance team before performing this action.
warnings.cycleTooLong: Cycle end date should not be more than 2 weeks after the start date.
warnings.noSemiMonthlyTalentAgreement: The talent must have Semi-Monthly Payments Agreement.
